rationale: Elec. Code §253.034 governs timing of political contributions during legislative sessions. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: During the period beginning on the 30th day before the date a regular legislative session convenes and continuing through the 20th day after the date of final adjournment, a person may not knowingly make a political contribution to:
_note: Rule text concerns campaign finance blackout periods, wholly unrelated to homestead exemption appraisal thresholds.
